title: Method of intensive cultivation of plants in a production unit
abstract: Method of intensive cultivation of plants in a production unit where the production unit is for the acceleration of the photosynthesis of plants connected to an integral biotechnological reactor for wastewater treatment with synergistic use of carbon dioxide CO 2 generated during biotechnological degradation of pollutants and a simultaneous use of the oxygen 0 2 released by the photosynthesis of plants which is from the inner space of the greenhouse, in which the production unit is situated, blown in the form of compressed air with a higher oxygen O 2 content, back to the aeration reactor space, thus increasing the biological activity of micro- organisms involved in the biological wastewater treatment.
claims: Claims 1. The method of intensive plant cultivation in a production unit, characterized in that the production unit is for acceleration of the photosynthesis of plants connected to an integral biotechnological reactor for wastewater treatment with synergistic use of carbon dioxide CO 2 generated during biotechnological degradation of pollutants, and a simultaneous use of the oxygen O2 released by the photosynthesis of plants which is from the inner space of the greenhouse, in which the production unit is situated, blown in the form of compressed air with a higher oxygen O2 content back to the aeration reactor space, thus increasing the biological activity of micro-organisms involved in the biological wastewater treatment. 2. The method according to claim 1 , characterized in that it simultaneously uses the waste heat from wastewater which is taken from the purified water using heat pumps, and then it is used for heating the greenhouse space above the biotechnology reactor. 3. The method according to claim 2, characterized in that the heat pumps for accumulation of electricity produced by photovoltaic panels are powered by a battery. 4. The method according to claim 1 or 2, characterized in that the greenhouse space with the production unit are illuminated by LED light sources during the day or night operation according to the requirements for the production of plants. 5. The method according to claim 1 , characterized in that the sludge from the treated wastewater is used as a source of fertilisers and ions for growing plants. 6. The method according to claim 1 , characterized in that the production unit includes a system of vertical hydroponic or aeroponic growing crops in mobile or stationary shelves.
